name: HLP400 Heavy Load Platform
descr: Heavy Load Platform — 400 tonne load. Used for oversize/overmass transport on approved routes.

name: W80 Wheel Load
descr: NSW wheel load model — 80kN per wheel. Used for local road bridges and pedestrian bridges in NSW.

name: A160 Axle Load
descr: NSW axle load model — 160kN per axle. NSW-specific heavy vehicle load for bridges on gazetted routes.

name: Cooper E Loading
descr: Cooper E railway loading model — standard North American/ARTC freight train axle pattern.

name: UIC 60 Loading
descr: Union Internationale des Chemins de fer loading — European heavy freight standard used for ARTC bridges.

name: AS 5100 General Purpose
descr: AS 5100.2 General Purpose loading model for standard road bridges.

name: AS 5100 Heavy Precision
descr: AS 5100.2 Heavy Precision loading model for special purpose bridges.
